{{CargoOrgan
|name=Katyusha
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10673
|idx=30
|description="Armed with missile systems, it delivers the ultimate obliteration. Justice only exists within its range."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=On combat start, launch a Katyusha Rocket, dealing DMG equal to 63% of ATK!
|hp=1552
|def=104
|atk=135
|rush=237
|gene1=In Fissure combat, Earth DMG +120
|gene2=Per 5 Apostles defeated, {race} RUSH +40
Apostles defeated: 15/15
|gene3=Fire DMG +60
|gene4=In Gene Sims, RUSH DMG +10%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, RUSH DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
